name: forge-observability
description: DOGFOOD: Pi PM assigns the 'run observability' backlog item -> Pi Software builds it through spec->plan->build->validate. The forge improving itself via its own pipeline.

steps.message: Read ./pipeline/REQUEST-observability.md. Write a Sabbk-compliant handoff to ./spike/workdir/pi-software/INBOX-handoff.md assigning it to pi-software (frontmatter from: pi-pm, to: pi-software, tier: 2, playbook: software, phase: BUILD, priority: medium) + Summary, Facts, and an Actions checklist mirroring the acceptance criteria. Cite Playbook + Phase. Do NOT build it yourself.

Your assignment is in ./INBOX-handoff.md (+ pipeline/REQUEST-observability.md). Build it on a -ai branch via spec->plan->build->validate: write lib/run-log.mjs + bin/forge-log.sh, wire run-spike.sh, keep the diff small, run jigs, and write VALIDATION.md.
